  "findings": [
    "Crimp ring fails go/no-go gauge, indicating insufficient compression or improper crimp tool/die usage.",
    "Defective crimp joint may lead to leaks or blow-offs under pressure."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Cut out defective crimp joint and re-crimp using calibrated tool and correct ring per manufacturer specs.",
    "Re-test all accessible crimp joints with go/no-go gauge before close-out."
  ],
  "rationale": "A crimp ring that fails a go/no-go gauge does not meet the manufacturer's installation requirements and violates IPC 2018 Section 605.12.3 (or equivalent) requiring joints to be made in accordance with the manufacturer's instructions. This is a non-compliant, defective condition that compromises system integrity.",
  "references": [
    "IPC 2018 Section 605.12.3",
    "Manufacturer installation instructions for PEX crimp fittings"
  ]
}
